meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Build a Portfolio Without Experience
content.seo_description: Stop waiting for clients. Use this intermediate checklist to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build a high-converting portfolio and land your first deal.
content.answer_block: You don't need a past portfolio; you need a proof of competence. By rapidly building high-utility AI micro-tools using Antigravity and Claude Code, you manufacture authority. Pitch these specific, working solutions directly to prospects to bypass the 'experience' barrier and prove your value through immediate, deployable technical execution.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest enemy. You have the skills to build, but the market demands a history of success you haven't been granted yet. This creates a paradox: you need a portfolio to get a client, but you need a client to build a portfolio. It is a cycle of stagnation that kills thousands of freelance careers before they even launch.

We are breaking that cycle today. You will stop waiting for permission and start building your own momentum. By leveraging the velocity of Claude Code and the architectural precision of Antigravity, we will transform your raw technical ability into a high-impact, deployable portfolio that forces clients to take notice.

steps.title: Define Your Niche Micro-Tool
steps.description: Identify a repetitive task for a specific industry (e.g., automated CRM data extraction for real estate). Don't build a generic app; build a problem-solver.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Define a high-value, single-purpose AI micro-tool for [Target Industry] that solves a $500/month pain point. Provide a feature spec and data schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap for a [Target Industry] micro-tool that automates [Task]'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffold with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. Speed is your competitive advantage; don't waste time on auth or database setup manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js + Supabase boilerplate for the defined micro-tool. Include clean UI components and API route handlers.

steps.title: Implement Core Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on the business logic. Focus on the 'magic moment' where the AI delivers the value to the end user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for the AI integration using the OpenAI SDK. Ensure robust error handling and stream the response to the frontend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement the core AI logic to process [Task] and handle streaming responses'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: A demo is useless if it's only on your machine. Deploy it so clients can click a link and see it in action instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration and an automated CI/CD pipeline script for this project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Configure deployment scripts and verify build success'

steps.title: The 'Proof-of-Value' Pitch
steps.description: Don't send a resume. Send a link to the tool you built and ask for feedback on their specific workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold outreach email that highlights the tool's utility for [Target Client] and asks for a 5-minute feedback call to improve the product.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft a high-conversion cold email for this project to send to [Target Prospect Type]'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Request a Custom Feature' button in your demo app to start a conversation about paid consulting.
Use Loom to record a 60-second video of your tool solving a real problem; attach the link to your pitch.
Focus on the 'Time Saved' metric in your pitch rather than the technology used; clients buy outcomes, not code.
Keep your portfolio projects focused on a single vertical to build 'Expert Authority' rather than 'Generalist' status.
Build a 'Private Version' of your tool that you can customize for each client—turning a portfolio piece into a recurring SaaS product.
content.next_steps: Once your first tool is live, repeat this process for three different niches. Then, create a centralized portfolio landing page that showcases all three, effectively moving from a 'newbie' to a 'specialist' in under 14 days.
content.conversion_block: Don't let lack of experience keep you on the sidelines. Your first client is one build away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
